ham.subject: Your IT Support Password Reset Confirmation
ham.body:
Hello Alex,

This is to confirm that we have successfully reset your corporate password at 09:44 UTC on 04‑Feb‑2026.

You can log in to the employee portal with your new credentials by clicking the link below:
<URL>

If you did not request this change, please reply to this email or contact IT Support immediately.

Thank you for keeping your account secure.

Best regards,
IT Support Team

spam.subject: ⚠️ Immediate Security Action Needed – Account Inactive Soon
spam.body:
Dear Alex,

Our security monitoring has flagged suspicious activity on your corporate account. As a precaution, we have temporarily disabled access to prevent unauthorized usage.

You must verify your identity within 24 hours to restore full access. Failure to act will result in permanent suspension of your account and possible data loss.

Please click the secure link below to confirm your identity and unlock your account:
<URL>

If you ignore this notice, your department access, email, and internal tools will remain inaccessible.

Priority: High

Sincerely,
Security Operations
(Corporate Safety Team)
